title: Guppy Breeding Basics
description: Learn how to breed guppies and raise the fry.

dialogue.text: To breed guppies, select a healthy male and female and place them in a separate breeding tank with plenty of cover.
Floating plants give the fry a place to hide. Maintain warm, clean water between 24 and 28 degrees Celsius.
After a few days you'll notice tiny fry swimming near the surface. Feed them powdered food or baby brine shrimp.
Keep the water pristine and separate adults if they harass the fry. Soon you'll have a healthy new generation.
